data.body:
Admittedly coming at this with my mixed Quaker-Catholic background, but I can’t do Just War doctrine. 

A needed use of force when all other means are exhausted is not definitionally just! It’s simply a decision that the lesser of two evils is preferable to permitting a greater evil.
